required_bundle_properties: cheapest_option_is_not_always_optimal (at least one trade-off dimension favors a non-cheapest option per bundle)
option_array_order_varies_across_bundles (no fixed cheapest-first or alphabetical-first convention)
provenance_requirement: Every provider_id/description must be explicitly synthetic (e.g. 'Provider ID synthetic_hotel_042') -- never phrased to imply a real company name, real price, or real booking availability.
generation_discipline: deterministic generator -> generated candidate JSON -> schema validation -> internal consistency validation -> source-controlled materialization (Step 6.5-8). LLM-generated content is never committed directly as a fixture without passing this pipeline.
